evidence.snippet: X_train, X_test, y_train, y_test = train_test_split(X, y, test_size=test_size, random_state=RANDOM_STATE, stratify=y)

data.notes: Imputation is fit on the full dataframe (line 28) before train_test_split (line 35). The imputer sees test-set rows; this is data leakage, not fit-on-train-only.
